subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath subdued all within creation through the melodies of His Most Exalted Pen, and through it hath caused the Trumpet to be sounded [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی سخر من فی الانشاء بنغمات قلمه الاعلی و به نفخ فی الصور و
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @predictions and prophecies, @martyrs and martyrdom, @goodly deeds; actions, @self-concealment of the Manifestation of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
